text:
spec_broad 
 Broad specialty based on spec_prim_1 . 
1 = Physician - Primary care 
2 = Physician - Medical specialty 
3 = Physician - Surgical specialty 
4 = Physician - Obstetrics/gynecology with no primary care specialty. 
5 = Physician - Hospital-based specialty (includes designated hospitalists) 
6 = Physician - Psychiatry 
7 = Non-physician – Nurse Practitioner and Physician Assistant 
8 = Non-physician – Other Advanced Practice Registered Nurses (APRN) 
9 = Non-physician – Limited
